ambiences.title: Forest Focus
ambiences.description: Immerse yourself in a peaceful forest setting with gentle bird calls and rustling leaves. Perfect for deep work and concentration.

ambiences.title: Ocean Calm
ambiences.description: Let the soothing sounds of ocean waves wash away your stress. The rhythmic patterns encourage deep breathing and relaxation.

ambiences.title: Rainy Night
ambiences.description: Soft raindrops and distant thunder create the perfect soundscape for better sleep. Scientifically proven to improve sleep quality.

ambiences.title: Mountain Stream
ambiences.description: The gentle flow of a mountain stream refreshes your mind and spirit. Ideal for resetting after a busy day.

ambiences.title: Zen Garden
ambiences.description: Walk through a serene Japanese garden with water fountains and wind chimes. A minimalist approach to mindfulness.

ambiences.title: Thunder Meditation
ambiences.description: Harness the power of distant thunder combined with rain. Perfect for concentration during challenging tasks.
